'''dhataza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okavirus|okavirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okavirus|okavirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhataza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhætæzæth || dhætæzæj || dhætæzæsh || dhætæzæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhatatazath || dhatatazaj || dhatatazash || dhatataza
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhatazath || dhatazaj || dhatazash || dhataza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhatafzafth || dhatafzafj || dhatafzafsh || dhatafzaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhatazatha || dhatazaja || dhatazasha || dhatazaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhatazath || dhatazaj || dhatazash || dhataza
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhatazathal || dhatazajal || dhatazashal || dhatazakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhatazaathatha || dhatazaajaja || dhatazaashasha || dhatazaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhatazathan || dhatazajan || dhatazashan || dhatazakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhatazathaoro || dhatazajaoro || dhatazashaoro || dhatazakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
